title: Durability Guard
description: A Mod so you dont lose your Pickaxe anymore. It disables your Tools when your Durability low is.
body:
---
# 🛡️ DurabilityGuard
### Never break your tools again.

DurabilityGuard automatically protects your valuable tools by locking them the moment their durability drops to a critical threshold. No more accidentally mining with a one-hit-from-breaking Netherite pickaxe — your gear stays safe without you having to think about it.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🔒 **Automatic Tool Locking** — Left-click is blocked once a tool's durability reaches your configured threshold
- ⚙️ **Fully Configurable Threshold** — Set anywhere from 1 to 3000 durability points to match your playstyle
- 🔊 **Sound Feedback** — Plays an audible warning when a tool gets locked (toggleable)
- 💬 **Action Bar Notifications** — Get a subtle in-game message the moment a tool is protected
- 🖥️ **In-Game GUI** — Configure everything without leaving your world (default key: `O`)
- ⚡ **Lightweight** — Pure client-side, zero performance impact, no server mod required

---

## 🎮 How to Use

1. Install the mod (see requirements below)
2. Press **`O`** in-game to open the settings menu
3. Set your durability threshold
4. Play without worrying about your tools ever again ✅

> 💡 **Tip:** The keybind can be changed under **Options → Controls**.

---

## 📋 Requirements

| Dependency | Version |
|---|---|
| Minecraft | 1.21.11 |
| Fabric Loader | ≥ 0.18.4 |
| Fabric API | 0.141.3+1.21.11 |

---
